page: Microsoft Azure M176-88bds_v3 is a memory-optimized virtual machine belonging to the MBDSMediumMemoryv3 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features an x86_64 architecture powered by a dedicated Intel Xeon 8473C processor operating at a high base frequency of 4.0 GHz. The configuration provides 44 physical cores and 88 vCPUs with hyper-threading enabled. It is equipped with 1536.0 GB of RAM, translating to 17.45 GB of memory per core. Local storage includes a 410 GB disk, and the instance is Premium Storage capable for enhanced block storage performance.

Benchmark results indicate top-tier performance across multiple vectors. The server achieves top 10% placement in uncached memory bandwidth, with read speeds of 419.99 GB/sec and write speeds of 186.04 GB/sec. CPU performance is highly competitive, scoring in the top 10% for Geekbench single-core (2181.0) and multi-core (20824.0) tests, as well as the Passmark CPU score (94297.76). Multi-threaded bzip3 decompression reaches 521.28 GB/sec, and static web serving throughput peaks at 102.17 GB/sec. The hardware supports advanced instruction sets including AVX-512 and Intel Advanced Matrix Extensions (AMX) for accelerated matrix operations.

Given its massive 1.5 TB memory capacity and high-frequency dedicated Intel Xeon cores, this server offers a high-density resource profile suitable for demanding enterprise workloads. It is highly optimized for memory-intensive applications, large-scale database operations, and high-throughput data processing. The combination of a high memory-to-vCPU ratio, fast memory bandwidth, and strong multi-threaded performance makes it a strong fit for relational databases, in-memory data stores like Redis, software compilation pipelines, and medium-scale LLM inference tasks.
description: Microsoft Azure M176-88bds_v3 is a memory-optimized virtual machine from the MBDSMediumMemoryv3 family, powered by a dedicated Intel Xeon 8473C processor running at 4.0 GHz. It features 88 vCPUs (44 physical cores) and a massive 1536.0 GB of RAM, providing 17.45 GB of memory per core. The server includes a 410 GB local disk and supports Premium Storage. In benchmark testing, the instance delivers top-tier performance, placing in the top 10% for uncached memory bandwidth (419.99 GB/sec read), Geekbench multi-core (20824.0), and Passmark database operations (34867.58). It also supports advanced instruction sets like AVX-512 and Intel AMX. This high-density hardware profile is optimized for memory-intensive enterprise workloads, large-scale databases, high-throughput web serving, and multi-threaded data processing.
og_description: Microsoft Azure M176-88bds_v3 is a memory-optimized server with 88 vCPUs, 1.5 TB of RAM, and a 4.0 GHz Intel Xeon CPU, delivering top-tier memory bandwidth and database performance.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure M176-88bds_v3 features 88 vCPUs, 1.5 TB RAM, and a 4.0 GHz Intel Xeon CPU, optimized for memory-intensive enterprise databases.
tagline: A high-frequency, memory-optimized server featuring 1.5 TB of RAM and dedicated Intel Xeon processors for demanding database workloads.
bullet_points: Dedicated Intel Xeon 8473C processor running at 4.0 GHz with 88 vCPUs.
Massive 1536.0 GB RAM configuration providing 17.45 GB per core.
Top-tier uncached memory read bandwidth of 419.99 GB/sec.
Includes 410 GB of local storage with Premium Storage capability.
Supports Intel AMX and AVX-512 instruction sets for advanced computing.
Optimized for large-scale databases, heavy data processing, and enterprise applications.
